# BP-110 positive: Gin ShouldBindJSON is used as a bare statement.
lang: go
file: BP-110-vulnerable.go
variant: gin
---
package sample

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

type Login struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
}

func login(c *gin.Context) {
	var request Login
	c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
	use(request)
}

func use(Login) {}
